title: How can I do a cumulative sum between rows
excerpt: I’m trying to get a cumulative budget total for the tasks on the project. Each task is a row.

posts.author: Sabu98 (Sandra Bustamante)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to get a cumulative budget total for the tasks on the project. Each task is a row.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sabu98 - the footer of the group will show the sum for the group. You could also use a connect board column and connect to the various items to show a sum of the data.

Hope this helps,
Mark
